Package uno.anahata.asi.agi.context

package uno.anahata.asi.agi.context
Manages the conversation history and the injection of just-in-time context.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    uno.anahata.asi.agi
    Provides model-agnostic, intelligent configuration objects for agi sessions.
    uno.anahata.asi.agi.context.core
    Defines the contract for providers that inject just-in-time context into an AI request.
  • Class
    Description
    BasicContextProvider
    A basic, reusable implementation of the ContextProvider interface that provides the foundational logic for hierarchical context management.
    ContextManager
    The definitive manager for an Agi session's context in the V2 architecture.
    ContextPosition
    Defines the position where a ContextProvider's content should be injected into the request.
    ContextProvider
    Defines the contract for providers that inject just-in-time context into an AI request.
    ContextWindowGarbageCollector
    Orchestrates the monitoring and logging of the Context Window Garbage Collection (CwGC).
    ContextWindowGarbageCollector.Stats
    Data object containing the categorized token metrics.
    GarbageCollectorRecord
    A record of a single garbage collection event, capturing the recycling of a conversation turn.
